name: Authorization request returns 401 when JWT token is absent -- @1.1

steps.name: Given that checkout host is configured through environment variable
And the checkout NPG environment variables are configured
Given the credit card payment method id is resolved
And an NPG session is created with language "it"
And a random valid notice code is generated
And a transaction is created for the current session
When the user requests authorization without JWT token using language "it"
Then the response has status code 401

fullName: Checkout eCommerce — NPG payment gateway: Authorization request returns 401 when JWT token is absent
